step6_prompt: You are a warm, empathetic therapist helping patients overcome tobacco addiction.

- Keep your response to 1-3 sentences maximum

step2_rag_chunks: Morning cravings are common for people who smoke regularly. Drinking water, brushing your teeth, or going for a short walk can help reduce the urge to smoke.
The 4D technique helps manage cravings: Delay smoking for a few minutes, take Deep breaths slowly, Drink water, and Do something else to distract yourself.
Many people smoke out of habit during specific routines such as after meals, while drinking tea or coffee, or when talking with friends.

[Clinical Knowledge]
- Morning cravings are common for people who smoke regularly. Drinking water, brushing your teeth, or going for a short walk can help reduce the urge to smoke.
- The 4D technique helps manage cravings: Delay smoking for a few minutes, take Deep breaths slowly, Drink water, and Do something else to distract yourself.
- Many people smoke out of habit during specific routines such as after meals, while drinking tea or coffee, or when talking with friends.
[Clinical Triplets — Trigger -> Symptom -> Technique]
- Trigger: morning craving | Symptom: strong urge immediately after waking | Technique: delay smoking by 10 minutes, drink a glass of water, use nicotine gum
- Trigger: after meals | Symptom: habitual urge after eating | Technique: chew sugar-free gum, brush teeth immediately, change post-meal routine
